stemHtml: According to CS-25, the final take-off speed VFTO…

options.a: may not be less than 1.08 V<sub>S1 </sub>and must provide the manoeuvring capability.
options.b: must be more than 1.1 V<sub>MCA</sub> and must provide the max climb gradient.
options.c: may not be less than 1.18 V<sub>SR</sub> and must provide at least the minimum climb gradient.
options.d: may not be less than V<sub>2</sub> min and V<sub>R</sub> plus the speed increment to screen height.
